author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Blocker: Embedding::forward does token→index→gather on CPU. For CUDA graph capture, the entire decode step must stay on GPU. Need a GPU embedding lookup kernel: given a token ID (f32 on GPU) and weight matrix [V, D] on GPU, produce [1, D] output on GPU. This is a simple gather kernel: output[d] = weight[token_id * D + d].
